source_proposition: The paper contrasts positive V-得-R with negative V-唔-R for the potential reading.
implementation_effect: Retain overt V-唔-R as a distinct potential-polarity construction.
forbidden_inference: Do not analyze it as ordinary preverbal VP negation.

parser_claim: Attested negative potential examples include 攞唔起 and 行唔入去.
source_proposition: Result and directional material remains overt after 唔 in negative potential forms.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt result/directional head.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert hidden 得 between 唔 and the result.

parser_claim: The source reports modern potential negation as V-唔-R rather than V-唔-得-R, while permission negation has a different structure.
exact_locator: author PDF section 2 summary, footnote 4, and section 4.3
source_proposition: Potential and permission/ability uses of 得 have different negative counterparts.
implementation_effect: Keep potential polarity separate from generic modal negation.
forbidden_inference: Do not universalize the authors’ judgments beyond the reported variety and consultants.

parser_claim: Runtime recognizes V + 唔 + 到/完 + optional object under one NegativePotentialComplement node.
source_proposition: The runtime preserves the key overt order but merges distinct result heads and argument profiles.
implementation_effect: Split result-head subtypes and constrain object licensing.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat 到 and 完 as interchangeable merely because both follow 唔.

parser_claim: No reviewed source establishes a free V-唔-{到,完}+optional-object rule for the full runtime lexicon.
exact_locator: R10 source screen and runtime comparison
source_proposition: The construction family is real, but lexical selection and argument realization remain constrained and incompletely mapped.
implementation_effect: Retain only a narrowed, review-bearing family pending head-specific research.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer ungrammaticality for forms outside the mapped examples.

parser_claim: Cantonese positive directional potential permits V-得-direction(-deixis), as in 行得入去.
source_proposition: The directional continuation supplies the result endpoint associated with the potential reading.
implementation_effect: Retain an overt positive directional-potential subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the direction/deictic sequence as optional or hidden.

parser_claim: The same surface 得 can have permission/ability readings outside a result-denoting directional structure.
source_proposition: Structural context determines whether postverbal 得 is root modal or result potential.
implementation_effect: Require a licensed directional result constituent.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer potential from 得 adjacency alone.

parser_claim: Runtime composes action/motion verb + 得 + one of a bounded directional inventory + 嚟/去.
source_proposition: The implementation has an explicit directional/deictic boundary but no pattern-specific source for every listed combination.
implementation_effect: Keep the overt composition but validate lexical combinations before promotion.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat implementation inventory as external authority.

parser_claim: R10 did not establish free productivity for all runtime verb, direction, and deixis combinations.
exact_locator: R10 source-search log entries R10-S06 and R10-S10
source_proposition: One directly attested pattern supports the family, not the complete combinatorial space.
implementation_effect: Retain narrowing and corpus-validation requirements.
forbidden_inference: Do not mark unattested combinations ungrammatical solely from this gap.

parser_claim: Cantonese negative directional potential permits V-唔-direction(-deixis), as in 行唔入去.
source_proposition: Negative potential replaces 得 with 唔 while retaining the directional result.
implementation_effect: Retain an overt negative directional-potential subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not parse it as generic preverbal negation.

parser_claim: Positive V-得-R and negative V-唔-R use distinct overt polarity morphology.
exact_locator: author PDF section 2 summary and section 4.3
source_proposition: The negative does not require an overt or hidden 得 after 唔.
implementation_effect: Preserve polarity as an explicit constructional contrast.
forbidden_inference: Do not generate V-唔-得-R as the default negative potential.

parser_claim: Runtime composes action/motion verb + 唔 + direction + 嚟/去 under a dedicated node.
source_proposition: The dedicated node preserves the sourced surface contrast but its inventories remain heuristic.
implementation_effect: Keep the node narrowed and review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat every directional chain as licensed.

parser_claim: R10 did not independently validate all runtime negative directional combinations or object placements.
exact_locator: R10 source-search log entries R10-S07 and R10-S10
source_proposition: The family is source-linked through direct examples, while breadth remains unresolved.
implementation_effect: Require corpus and head-specific validation before any productive status.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer categorical rejection of untested forms.

parser_claim: Postverbal descriptive 得, illustrated by 行得好快, is explicitly distinct from the result-potential use of 得.
source_proposition: The paper identifies a separate construction linking a verb to a postverbal descriptive modifier.
implementation_effect: Represent descriptive degree/manner separately from potential V-得-R.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every postverbal modifier is a potential complement.

parser_claim: Directional/path sequences and resultative structures have independently described internal ordering and analyses.
source_proposition: The motion study distinguishes single-verb, path-verb/serial, and resultative motion encodings.
implementation_effect: Keep directional motion separate from generic verb complementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse competing complement and serial-verb analyses under one language claim.

parser_claim: Lexical RVC and V-到 result strategies are themselves internally constrained and distinct.
source_proposition: Result complementation cannot serve as an unrestricted residual category for all postverbal material.
implementation_effect: Route resultative profiles to narrower evidence-linked structures.
forbidden_inference: Do not use VerbComplementVP as proof of a general complement schema.

parser_claim: Runtime combines degree/manner, directional motion, 返-plus-object, caused motion, and restorative/repetitive profiles under VerbComplementVP.
source_proposition: The current node is a heterogeneous implementation umbrella crossing multiple source-defined families.
implementation_effect: Retain it only as internal grouping until subtypes are separately represented.
forbidden_inference: Do not present the umbrella label as one Cantonese construction.

parser_claim: Future work must split postverbal descriptive, directional, resultative, restorative, and caused-motion profiles before changing runtime behavior.
source_proposition: Separate nodes can preserve overt surfaces and competing analyses without inventing a universal complement relation.
implementation_effect: Keep current behavior frozen and mark the umbrella for split.
forbidden_inference: Do not retire accepted output until a separately authorized remediation design exists.

parser_claim: Cantonese permits prenominal nominal modification both with overt 嘅 and, in restricted environments, without 嘅.
source_proposition: Sio documents modifier-ge3-noun and restricted bare modifier-noun patterns, with interpretive differences where both occur.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt bare and ge3-marked modification as distinct subprofiles.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 嘅 is always required or that every modifier can occur bare.

parser_claim: Cantonese permits prenominal nominal modification both with overt 嘅 and, in restricted environments, without 嘅.
source_proposition: Yu illustrates nominal order and both directly adjacent and ge3-linked modifiers.
implementation_effect: Use only as corroboration of overt forms and ordering.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote productivity from an unpublished paper.

parser_claim: 嘅-marked nominal modifiers are not a single lexical category: adjectives, possessors, relative clauses, and nominal complements can precede 嘅.
source_proposition: The chapter explicitly treats modifier broadly and illustrates adjective, possessor, relative-clause, aboutness, and nominal-complement modifiers.
implementation_effect: Split modifier subtypes while preserving overt 嘅.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat all pre-嘅 material as the same syntactic relation.

parser_claim: Bare modifier-noun and modifier-嘅-noun forms can differ in interpretation and distribution.
source_proposition: Bare modifiers are allowed only in certain environments, and ge3-marked variants can impose a contrastive interpretation.
implementation_effect: Keep bare and ge3-marked branches separate in any future redesign.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat presence or absence of 嘅 as semantically inert.

parser_claim: Bare modifier-noun and modifier-嘅-noun forms can differ in interpretation and distribution.
source_proposition: Yu’s inventory corroborates multiple modifier placements and nominal orders.
implementation_effect: Use as a secondary check on surface order only.
forbidden_inference: Do not inherit Yu’s full theoretical analysis.

parser_claim: Multiple prenominal modifiers are ordered and may form separate modifier-嘅 units rather than one flat sequence.
source_proposition: Sio describes modifier-ge3 as a constituent and reports ordering contrasts among multiple modifiers.
implementation_effect: Avoid one free optional-slot template for all modifier combinations.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted permutation or unlimited recursion.

parser_claim: The runtime ModifiedNP node also absorbs demonstrative/classifier material, direct wh determiners, bare modifiers, verb modifiers, and ge3-marked material, which no source defines as one construction.
source_proposition: The broad runtime template and specialized direct-wh path overlap several independently sourced nominal constructions.
implementation_effect: Retain ModifiedNP only as an internal umbrella until branches are separated.
forbidden_inference: Do not present the umbrella label as a productive Cantonese grammar rule.

parser_claim: Bare modifier + noun order is attested in Cantonese.
source_proposition: Sio gives bare dung3 pizza and discusses bare pre-nominal modifiers.
implementation_effect: Permit only source-compatible bare modifier profiles.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer an unrestricted modifier slot.

parser_claim: Bare modifier + noun order is attested in Cantonese.
source_proposition: Yu independently illustrates direct adjective-noun modification.
implementation_effect: Corroborate the overt surface order.
forbidden_inference: Do not use this source alone for productivity.

parser_claim: Bare modifiers are restricted by modifier type and environment.
source_proposition: The chapter states that ge3 is generally required before a bare noun, while only limited modifier types or classifier contexts permit omission.
implementation_effect: Narrow the runtime category and lexical inventory.
forbidden_inference: Do not allow arbitrary predicates, clauses, or noun phrases as bare modifiers.

parser_claim: Bare and ge3-marked variants can carry different contrastive interpretations.
source_proposition: The bare cold-pizza form and the ge3-marked form differ in contextual contrast requirements.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt linker as semantically relevant metadata.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse the two forms merely because they share a head noun.

parser_claim: The current ModifierNP template accepts any child assigned modifier + head_noun, broader than the externally described bare-modifier classes.
source_proposition: Runtime uses a category-level two-slot template without a source-grounded modifier inventory or interpretation boundary.
implementation_effect: Keep provisional and narrow before implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert slot compatibility into a language claim.

parser_claim: Possessor + 嘅 + noun is an attested Cantonese nominal-modification pattern.
source_proposition: Sio gives ngo5 ge3 ce1 “my car(s)” as a possessor modifier followed by ge3 and a noun.
implementation_effect: Recognize overt possessor-linker-head structure without hidden material.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every NP-ge3-N sequence is possession.

parser_claim: Possessor + 嘅 + noun is an attested Cantonese nominal-modification pattern.
source_proposition: Yu independently illustrates possessive nominal structures.
implementation_effect: Use as corroboration of overt ordering.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the unpublished analysis as decisive.

parser_claim: Pre-嘅 modifiers include relations other than possession or simple association.
source_proposition: Relative clauses, aboutness relatives, and nominal complements all occur before ge3 and a head noun.
implementation_effect: Split possessor/associative, relative, aboutness, and complement uses.
forbidden_inference: Do not label all nominal_modifier + 嘅 + noun strings associative.

parser_claim: Aboutness and nominal-complement modifiers are overtly distinct examples within the ge3 nominal-modification domain.
source_proposition: The chapter contrasts the sound of Peter’s singing with the news that someone killed themself.
implementation_effect: Preserve relation uncertainty or subtype evidence rather than forcing possession.
forbidden_inference: Do not derive a uniform semantic role from the linker alone.

parser_claim: The runtime AssociativeNP label is triggered by a generic nominal_modifier + 嘅 + head_noun sequence and therefore overstates one associative relation.
source_proposition: The source-supported surface schema spans several relations, while runtime assigns one umbrella label and overlapping ModifiedNP slots.
implementation_effect: Retain overt structure but split or relabel relation subtypes before promotion.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the label as evidence that the relation is associative.

parser_claim: 啲 can occur as a plural classifier before a visible noun.
source_proposition: The paper calls di1 a plural classifier and reports plural interpretation in CL-N and NUM-CL-N expressions.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt 啲 and the visible noun head.
forbidden_inference: Do not analyze 啲 as English plural morphology.

parser_claim: 一啲 + noun is compatible with plural interpretation; 啲 is not limited to a bare two-token template.
source_proposition: The attested example allows optional jat1 before di1 and yields a plural reading.
implementation_effect: Keep 一啲 and bare 啲 profiles distinct but related.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim that the current 啲+N node exhausts the construction family.

parser_claim: The interpretation and distribution of Cantonese nominal expressions depend on position and information status, not a fixed English determiner gloss.
source_proposition: The corpus study relates nominal-expression type to number, definiteness, information status, and preverbal/postverbal position.
implementation_effect: Keep glosses context-sensitive and structure-first.
forbidden_inference: Do not hardcode 啲 as uniformly “some,” “the,” or “these.”

parser_claim: 啲-marked nominal expressions occur as nominal expressions rather than an object-specific construction.
exact_locator: pp. 436-441; corpus inventory and positional analysis
source_proposition: The corpus inventory treats di1-N as a nominal-expression type across syntactic positions.
implementation_effect: Assign topic/subject/object role only in the containing clause.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer object role from 啲+N itself.

parser_claim: The runtime describes 啲 simultaneously as determiner, partitive, classifier-like, and quantity while emitting one node, exceeding the source-neutral claim.
source_proposition: The current label and slots mix category analysis, number interpretation, and learner glossing.
implementation_effect: Relabel theory-neutrally or narrow to overt di1-marked nominal expression.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert a contested category choice into parser fact.

parser_claim: Contemporary Cantonese has at least classifier relative clauses and 嘅 relative clauses.
source_proposition: The chapter explicitly introduces classifier relatives and ge3 relatives with parallel candy examples.
implementation_effect: Split classifier and ge3 relative-clause profiles.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat ge3 as obligatory in every Cantonese relative clause.

parser_claim: Contemporary Cantonese has at least classifier relative clauses and 嘅 relative clauses.
source_proposition: The experiment contrasts classifier and ge3 RCs as two Cantonese construction types.
implementation_effect: Corroborate the subtype distinction with an independent author team overlap only partly distinct.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer exhaustive RC inventory from two experimental conditions.

parser_claim: In a 嘅 relative, the modifying clause precedes 嘅 and the overt head noun; classifier relatives lack that marker.
source_proposition: The chapter describes ge3 as linking the relative clause and head noun and notes its absence in classifier relatives.
implementation_effect: Preserve visible linker and head without hidden tokens.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat all pre-nominal clauses as ge3 relatives.

parser_claim: Classifier and 嘅 relatives differ in frequency, processing behavior, and proposed syntax.
source_proposition: The article states that the two RC types differ in syntactic analyses and frequency and are processed differently.
implementation_effect: Do not merge them under one homogeneous language claim.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert child-processing results into adult grammaticality or productivity rates.

parser_claim: A uniform filler-gap analysis is not the only published analysis of Cantonese relatives.
source_proposition: The authors discuss internally headed and noun-modifying-construction analyses in addition to gap-based accounts.
implementation_effect: Keep parser representation theory-neutral unless dependency evidence is overtly warranted.
forbidden_inference: Do not assert a silent object gap solely from surface order.

parser_claim: Classifier and 嘅 relatives have competing and construction-specific syntactic analyses.
source_proposition: The study’s motivation relies on distinct analyses for the two relative types.
implementation_effect: Record construction subtype separately from dependency analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not encode one analysis as settled Cantonese fact.

parser_claim: The runtime RelativeClauseNP recognizes only visible 嘅 + head patterns and may create a transitive object-gap predicate from the head, while the sourced family includes classifier relatives and disputed analyses.
source_proposition: The active function requires an overt head and action predicate, excludes several left-final nominal patterns, and can license a gap relation by heuristic.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt span but split RC type and dependency analysis; keep unresolved cases review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not fabricate a hidden object or imply the current heuristic covers Cantonese relatives generally.

parser_claim: Modifier-嘅 sequences can function as referential nominals without an overt noun.
source_proposition: Sio gives headless modifier-ge3 expressions in subject and object positions.
implementation_effect: Recognize the overt modifier + 嘅 span as headless nominal use.
forbidden_inference: Do not require or insert an overt noun token.

parser_claim: Headless modifier-嘅 forms can refer to contextually familiar subsets such as “the red ones” or “the edible ones.”
source_proposition: The examples are referential and discourse-dependent rather than kind-denoting.
implementation_effect: Mark discourse dependence and avoid fixed lexical head recovery.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a specific omitted noun from the modifier alone.

parser_claim: Modifier-嘅-noun is a headed adnominal construction distinct from headless modifier-嘅.
source_proposition: The chapter separately illustrates ge3 before an overt noun and noun-less referential ge3 nominals.
implementation_effect: Split headed modified NP from headless nominalized complement.
forbidden_inference: Do not use one AdjNP template for both structures.

parser_claim: Adnominal/headless nominalizing 嘅 must be distinguished from sentence-final assertive and predicative uses.
source_proposition: Sio explicitly separates adnominal ge3, assertive sentence-final ge3, and predicative ge3 in copular clauses.
implementation_effect: Require constructional context before assigning nominal-linker status.
forbidden_inference: Do not label every final 嘅 as a nominalized complement.

parser_claim: Runtime StativeNominalComplement conflates a headless stative + 嘅 opinion complement with a headed modifier/linker/head-noun template such as 好好嘅朋友.
source_proposition: Two active paths with different overt heads and functions emit the same node label.
implementation_effect: Split and relabel headed versus headless uses before promotion.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat ordinary headed nominal modification as a stative nominal complement.

parser_claim: A published empty-noun analysis for headless modifier-嘅 does not authorize insertion of a hidden noun in learner output.
source_proposition: Sio proposes an empty nominal after headless modifier-ge3 to represent a familiar set.
implementation_effect: Retain the surface construction and discourse dependency without materializing the theoretical empty noun.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert an abstract syntactic analysis into a hidden parser token or recovered lexical head.

parser_claim: Cantonese time words can function adverbially while remaining nominal in lexical category.
source_proposition: Wong distinguishes time words from adverbs and notes that time words can occur as subjects, modifiers, objects, and adverbials.
implementation_effect: Represent overt time expressions independently from their clause-level adjunct function.
forbidden_inference: Do not equate adverbial function with a lexical adverb category or insert a hidden adposition.

parser_claim: Temporal expressions may occur before the predicate and may also frame the clause before the subject.
source_proposition: The grammar places temporal expressions before the verb phrase and illustrates sentence-initial temporal framing.
implementation_effect: Permit sourced preverbal and clause-initial time-expression positions.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every initial time expression forms a subordinate TemporalClause.

parser_claim: Deictic calendar expressions show head-specific classifier behavior rather than a freely optional generic classifier.
source_proposition: Tang gives 上個星期 and 下個月 but 上年 and 下年 without 個.
implementation_effect: Encode exact attested forms or head-specific selection rather than one optional-classifier slot.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize 個 to every temporal head or treat its absence as arbitrary free variation.

parser_claim: The runtime TimeNP template temporal_modifier + optional classifier + time_head overstates classifier optionality across time heads.
source_proposition: The active template uses one optional classifier slot for heterogeneous heads, while external sources show head-specific patterns.
implementation_effect: Split lexicalized/deictic profiles or require head-specific compatibility before implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the generic optional-classifier template as productive Cantonese grammar.

parser_claim: A time NP used as an adjunct is not by that fact a temporal subordinate clause.
source_proposition: Yip’s temporal adverbial clauses contain an embedded predication plus an overt temporal introducer and, for 喺-TACs, a time head.
implementation_effect: Keep TimeNP, clause-level temporal adjunct, and temporal adverbial clause as separate representation layers.
forbidden_inference: Do not label a bare date, day, or period expression as a temporal adverbial clause.

parser_claim: Common deictic day and period expressions are lexical or construction-specific forms, not outputs of one unrestricted modifier rule.
source_proposition: The guide lists conventional day, week, month, and year expressions with differing morphology.
implementation_effect: Retain overt lexical forms and mark unverified combinations review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a complete productive paradigm from a short pedagogical inventory.

parser_claim: Nominal category does not determine subject, object, topic, or adjunct role without the containing construction.
source_proposition: The same class of time words can occupy several syntactic functions.
implementation_effect: Assign clause role from the larger parse while preserving the time expression itself.
forbidden_inference: Do not hard-code every TimeNP as an adverb, topic, or when-role solely from lexical membership.

parser_claim: Numeral-plus-time-unit expressions are supported, but classifier realization depends on the temporal head.
source_proposition: Tang contrasts duration forms such as 一個月 with 一年 and other head-specific patterns.
implementation_effect: Use head-specific measure profiles for duration expressions.
forbidden_inference: Do not permit or omit 個 uniformly across all time heads.

parser_claim: Distributive time expressions show head-specific 每 patterns: forms such as 每個月 and 每個星期 contrast with 每日 and 每年.
source_proposition: The grammar explicitly notes that monosyllabic time units such as 日 and 年 do not take 個 after 每, unlike month/week examples.
implementation_effect: Represent distributive time expressions separately with lexical/head-specific classifier selection.
forbidden_inference: Do not derive every 每-time expression from 每 + optional 個 + arbitrary time head.

parser_claim: Duration quantity and distributive/frequency expressions are distinct subtypes despite sharing quantity-like tokens.
exact_locator: runtime extraction and source comparison in source map
source_proposition: The runtime emits one label for numeral durations and 每-based distribution, while the sources describe different forms and functions.
implementation_effect: Split duration-measure and distributive-frequency profiles before implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not assign one semantic template or one slot sequence to both subtypes.

parser_claim: Cantonese conventionally uses 個字 as a five-minute time measure in clock-duration expressions.
source_proposition: Tang states that one 個字 corresponds to five minutes and illustrates larger multiples.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt 個字 unit and a conventional five-minute interpretation when the time-measure context is licensed.
forbidden_inference: Do not replace the surface tokens with hidden minute tokens or treat 字 as universally temporal.

parser_claim: The conventional 個字 calculation is semantic interpretation, not authorization to synthesize unspoken minute words.
exact_locator: runtime conventional-duration function; source comparison in source map
source_proposition: Runtime computes a minute value for 三個字 while the attested construction remains overtly quantity + 個 + 字.
implementation_effect: Store a derived duration value separately from the surface parse.
forbidden_inference: Do not rewrite 三個字 as 十五分鐘 or suppress a literal character-count reading when context is unresolved.

parser_claim: The runtime marks every standalone quantified time NP as context-required, but this batch found no source establishing that universal discourse condition.
exact_locator: runtime template notes and source screen
source_proposition: The reviewed sources attest standalone nominal forms and clause uses but do not justify a blanket fragment-status rule.
implementation_effect: Keep standalone status provisional and evaluate by context in a future targeted screen.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote universal context-required metadata from parser convention alone.

parser_claim: The runtime optional particle following a quantified time expression is not construction-level mapped in this batch.
exact_locator: runtime quantity + classifier? + time_head + particle? template
source_proposition: No inspected temporal source establishes an unrestricted post-TimeNP particle slot.
implementation_effect: Quarantine the generic particle extension pending particle-specific evidence.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that any clause-final particle belongs inside QuantifiedTimeNP.

parser_claim: Time-measure classifier omission and presence are lexically conditioned rather than free optionality.
source_proposition: The listed duration and calendar expressions alternate between classifier-bearing and classifierless forms according to the head expression.
implementation_effect: Require exact lexical/head compatibility for classifier realization.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat classifier presence as a stylistic option across the entire temporal lexicon.

parser_claim: A quantified temporal nominal does not receive adjunct, object, duration, or frequency function from its internal shape alone.
source_proposition: Time words are nominal elements that may participate in several syntactic functions.
implementation_effect: Keep nominal structure separate from clause-level temporal relation and duration interpretation.
forbidden_inference: Do not assign a when-role or duration role solely because a quantity and time head co-occur.

parser_claim: A simple time expression can frame a clause adverbially without forming a subordinate temporal clause.
source_proposition: Temporal expressions are placed before a predicate or before the subject in ordinary clauses.
implementation_effect: Represent these cases as a clause with a temporal adjunct/frame, not automatically as a temporal subordinate clause.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a hidden when-operator or subordinator from linear position alone.

parser_claim: Genuine Cantonese temporal adverbial clauses contain an embedded clause and overt temporal-clause structure such as 喺…嗰陣(時) or 當….
source_proposition: Yip identifies two temporal adverbial clause types with overt introducers and different time-head requirements.
implementation_effect: Reserve temporal-clause analysis for evidence-bearing clausal structures.
forbidden_inference: Do not extend the analysis to any sequence beginning with a TimeNP.

parser_claim: Runtime TemporalClause conflates simple time + predicate framing with subordinate temporal adverbial clauses.
source_proposition: Active templates wrap time + optional subject + predicate and time + locative + predicate, while the documented TACs have different overt structures.
implementation_effect: Split temporal frame/adjunct relations from temporal subordinate clauses before implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the existing umbrella label as one Cantonese construction.

parser_claim: The generic runtime fallback that wraps any core whose first token has role when is not a constructional diagnostic.
source_proposition: The fallback is driven by an assigned semantic role rather than independently documented form.
implementation_effect: Retire or constrain the fallback in a future authorized implementation after subtype tests exist.
forbidden_inference: Do not use parser-assigned role labels as linguistic evidence for the construction that assigned them.

parser_claim: The exact runtime time + locative phrase + predicate serial-purpose profile lacks a matching temporal-clause source in this batch.
exact_locator: runtime controlled serial-purpose template; source screen
source_proposition: The inspected sources cover time-expression position and overt TACs, not this composite template as one temporal construction.
implementation_effect: Keep the profile unmapped at the construction level and analyze its components separately.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that temporal, locative, and purpose relations form one productive clause template.

parser_claim: A time-framed environmental or subjectless clause can be represented with an adjunct relation without creating a special temporal subordinate clause.
source_proposition: Time words may function adverbially while retaining nominal status.
implementation_effect: Keep clause type and temporal adjunct role independent when no overt subordinate structure is present.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a subject, hidden copula, or temporal subordinator from the time expression.

parser_claim: A 喺-headed Cantonese temporal adverbial clause requires a head time NP such as 嗰陣(時) or 時候.
source_proposition: Yip states that hai-TACs must occur with a head time noun phrase gozan(si) or sihau.
implementation_effect: Define a bounded overt 喺-TAC subtype with its required time head.
forbidden_inference: Do not license bare 喺 + arbitrary clause as this subtype.

parser_claim: A 當-headed Cantonese temporal adverbial clause permits the head time NP to be absent.
source_proposition: Yip contrasts dong-TACs, where the time head can be omitted, with hai-TACs.
implementation_effect: Define a separate overt 當-TAC subtype rather than one optional-marker template.
forbidden_inference: Do not transfer the optional-head property to 喺-TACs or ordinary time frames.

parser_claim: The two temporal-adverbial-clause types have distinct internal and external behavior, but the paper’s operator and attachment analysis need not be adopted as parser ontology.
source_proposition: The paper derives the two types from different temporal-operator positions and attachment heights.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt subtype and observed distribution while keeping deeper syntactic analysis review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not encode null operators, movement, or attachment height as settled learner-facing facts.

parser_claim: The dormant runtime label should be redefined for explicit clausal temporal adjuncts rather than used as a synonym for TimeNP or time-framed main clause.
exact_locator: inventory status and source comparison in source map
source_proposition: The label is unmapped/dormant while active TemporalClause paths cover broader simple framing.
implementation_effect: Redefine and split it around overt 喺- and 當-TAC evidence before activation.
forbidden_inference: Do not activate the dormant label using the current broad TemporalClause templates.

parser_claim: No source supports an unrestricted rule that any time-initial clause or optional temporal marker forms a TemporalAdverbialClause.
source_proposition: The documented subtypes have overt structural requirements and contrasts.
implementation_effect: Require subtype-specific overt evidence and preserve unresolved cases as ordinary temporal framing or review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer free marker omission, a hidden temporal head, or universal TAC status.

parser_claim: Cantonese has a postverbal progressive marker 緊 in V-緊 and V-緊-NP structures.
source_proposition: The synopsis gives VP → V Asp (NP) with 做緊功課 and lists 緊 as progressive.
implementation_effect: Retain overt V-緊(-NP) recognition as a source-linked surface family.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted compatibility with every verb or object profile.

parser_claim: V緊 is not restricted to the runtime action_verb inventory.
source_proposition: Attested uses include motion 嚟緊, state-like 病緊, and extended-process 買緊樓.
implementation_effect: Replace a closed action-verb assumption with evidence-backed lexical/aspect compatibility checks in any future design.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert these examples into a rule that every predicate accepts 緊.

parser_claim: Progressive 緊 and continuous 住 have distinct readings even with the same verb.
source_proposition: 着緊 describes the dressing event in progress; 着住 describes the resulting continuing state of wearing.
implementation_effect: Keep 緊 and 住 as separate overt aspect constructions.
forbidden_inference: Do not gloss both uniformly as English -ing or treat them as interchangeable.

parser_claim: Postverbal 緊 and preverbal 喺度 are distinct progressive expressions.
source_proposition: Fan treats 喺度 VP and V緊 as different aspectual expressions with different distributional properties.
implementation_effect: Do not let ProgressiveVP silently cover 喺度 VP; source-map it separately later.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer synonymy, free alternation, or a hidden 喺度 in V緊.

parser_claim: Aspect selection is lexically and event-structurally constrained.
source_proposition: The paper lists 緊 as progressive and discusses incompatibility with certain situation types and inner-aspect combinations.
implementation_effect: Require lexical/event compatibility rather than a productive action_verb + 緊 rule.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize from the illustrative HPSG subset to a complete acceptability lexicon.

parser_claim: The runtime label combines transitive and intransitive profiles and relies on an action_verb category that is both under- and over-inclusive.
source_proposition: Two templates share ProgressiveVP, while sources show motion/state-like extensions and lexical restrictions.
implementation_effect: Split argument-frame representation from aspect-marker licensing.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the current two templates as one externally established construction.

parser_claim: The overt marker and predicate must remain visible and no present-time adverb should be invented.
source_proposition: The reference supplement presents the overt progressive marker attached to the verb without a hidden time word.
implementation_effect: Show 緊 as visible aspect and derive temporal interpretation without inserting 而家 or English tense.
forbidden_inference: Do not equate progressive aspect with present tense.

parser_claim: V緊O is a supported transitive progressive surface form.
source_proposition: 我而家食緊飯 exemplifies a main-clause transitive V緊O progressive.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt verb, marker, and object boundaries.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that all transitive verbs accept 緊.

parser_claim: The exact V緊O form is already represented by ProgressiveVP and does not constitute a separately sourced Cantonese construction.
source_proposition: ProgressiveTransitivePredicate duplicates the ProgressiveVP transitive template and is used as an internal subspan in a purpose-clause path.
implementation_effect: Merge or retire the duplicate label while preserving any internal span provenance.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote internal purpose-clause scaffolding to a language claim.

parser_claim: Transitivity is an argument-frame property independent of progressive aspect.
source_proposition: The grammar synopsis makes the object optional in the general aspect pattern.
implementation_effect: Represent aspect and argument frame compositionally rather than as a second language construction.
forbidden_inference: Do not assume an overt object is required by 緊.

parser_claim: Wh objects should remain owned by the question structure, but this is a parser-boundary decision rather than a separate progressive predicate type.
exact_locator: runtime object exclusion and wh wrappers
source_proposition: The runtime excludes wh objects from ProgressiveVP and creates question-specific wrappers.
implementation_effect: Keep overt wh scope visible while consolidating duplicate progressive labels.
forbidden_inference: Do not cite the exclusion heuristic as Cantonese grammar evidence.

parser_claim: Progressive 緊 can occur with motion predicates.
source_proposition: 有架巴士嚟緊 gives a motion event under progressive aspect.
implementation_effect: Permit motion-compatible V緊 without restricting the aspect family to non-motion action verbs.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every directional sequence accepts 緊 in every position.

parser_claim: A complex manner-plus-progressive-plus-path/deixis sequence is attested.
exact_locator: section 3.3, complex directional examples including 爬緊返去海邊
source_proposition: The article documents progressive aspect inside a manner-path-deictic motion sequence.
implementation_effect: Keep aspect, manner, path, deixis, and goal as separately visible components.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a free cross-product of all manner verbs and directional particles.

parser_claim: Directional order and lexical combinations are constrained.
exact_locator: pp. 263-270, directional ordering and aspect interaction examples
source_proposition: The chapter documents distinct directional predicates/particles and lexical asymmetries.
implementation_effect: Require independently licensed directional structure before adding progressive aspect.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat 行緊入/出嚟/去 as an exhaustive or universally productive template.

parser_claim: The runtime fallback recognizes only exact 行 + 緊 + 入/出 + 嚟/去 while the sourced family is broader and structurally articulated.
source_proposition: The current label is surface-specific and omits attested motion-progressive structures such as 嚟緊 and 爬緊返去海邊.
implementation_effect: Realign the node around compositional motion structure rather than one exact surface list.
forbidden_inference: Do not expand the exact fallback by analogy during the research freeze.

parser_claim: No hidden path, goal, or deictic element is licensed by progressive marking alone.
source_proposition: 緊 contributes progressive aspect; path/deixis/goal must be overt or independently licensed.
implementation_effect: Keep unresolved motion semantics review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer 入, 出, 嚟, 去, 返, or a destination from V緊 alone.

parser_claim: Cantonese wh expressions remain in situ and may serve as direct objects.
source_proposition: The synopsis states that wh subjects, direct objects, indirect objects, and adverbials are formed in situ.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt wh object in its surface argument position.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert movement traces or move the wh expression in learner output.

parser_claim: Progressive V緊 can combine with an overt object position.
source_proposition: The general aspect pattern permits an NP after V緊.
implementation_effect: Allow compositional combination with independently licensed wh-object syntax.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every V緊 + wh sequence is natural without lexical and argument compatibility.

parser_claim: No inspected source establishes ProgressiveWhObjectQuestion as a separate construction beyond progressive aspect plus ordinary wh-in-situ syntax.
source_proposition: The runtime creates a specialized node for 咩/乜嘢 after a progressive VP.
implementation_effect: Merge or retire the special node while preserving question and aspect relations compositionally.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat absence of a dedicated source as evidence that the surface question is unnatural.

parser_claim: The wh word is an overt unresolved object, not an ordinary object inferred inside ProgressiveVP.
source_proposition: The parser intentionally excludes wh tokens from the inner progressive object slot.
implementation_effect: Keep wh role and aspect scope explicit without duplicating the object.
forbidden_inference: Do not create a hidden object antecedent or duplicate the wh NP.

parser_claim: Cantonese wh adverbials, including place questions, remain in situ.
source_proposition: The synopsis explicitly includes adverbial wh questions in the in-situ system.
implementation_effect: Preserve an overt location-question phrase in its surface position.
forbidden_inference: Do not posit obligatory fronting or a hidden locative operator.

parser_claim: Progressive aspect and a location question are independently documented components.
source_proposition: The coding scheme treats Cantonese wh forms as in-situ questions, including location-related examples.
implementation_effect: Compose a sourced progressive VP with an independently sourced place-question relation.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a special progressive-place construction merely from co-occurrence.

parser_claim: No inspected source establishes the dormant/specialized ProgressivePlaceQuestion label as a distinct construction.
source_proposition: The label has a template but no independent fallback or construction-specific external analysis.
implementation_effect: Merge or retire the special node in favor of aspect plus locative-wh composition.
forbidden_inference: Do not interpret the evidence gap as rejection of ordinary questions such as doing something where.

parser_claim: The location variable must remain unresolved and overtly questioned.
source_proposition: Progressive aspect does not supply a location.
implementation_effect: Keep location question scope separate from the progressive predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a place from discourse unless an explicit context-linking layer licenses it.

parser_claim: Postverbal 住 marks continuous activity or a state without change and is distinct from progressive 緊.
source_proposition: The paper lists 住 as continuous activity/state without change and 緊 as progressive.
implementation_effect: Retain a separate continuous/durative aspect family for overt 住.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse 住 into generic progressive aspect.

parser_claim: The same verb may contrast dynamic V緊 and continuing-state V住 readings.
source_proposition: 着緊 means the dressing event is in progress; 着住 means wearing/remaining in the state.
implementation_effect: Represent the overt marker and its aspectual contrast.
forbidden_inference: Do not translate both with one undifferentiated English gloss.

parser_claim: V住 can take an overt object.
source_proposition: The reference supplement gives 我想以後成日陪住你.
implementation_effect: Permit sourced transitive V住 profiles.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every action_verb + 住 + object is licensed.

parser_claim: V住 has construction-sensitive distribution in subordinate or accompanying-action VPs.
source_proposition: Fan contrasts main-clause V緊 with subordinate/accompanying 唱住首兒歌 and 食住飯睇書.
implementation_effect: Split continuing-state and accompanying/subordinate profiles instead of one generic template.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer free substitution of 住 and 緊 across clause types.

parser_claim: Lexical/event selection restricts 住, especially outside licensed subordinate or state-continuation contexts.
source_proposition: The paper reports restrictions with dynamically changing predicates and special licensing in subordinate/irrealis environments.
implementation_effect: Require lexical and constructional compatibility before any productive implementation.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize from a few examples to all verbs or clause types.

parser_claim: The runtime action_verb + 住 + object template does not distinguish state-continuation from accompanying-action or subordinate uses.
source_proposition: One label covers structurally and semantically distinct V住 profiles.
implementation_effect: Split or annotate subtypes before implementation while preserving overt 住.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the current template as a single Cantonese construction claim.

parser_claim: Postverbal 過 is an experiential aspect marker.
source_proposition: The paper lists 過 among outer aspectual particles with experiential value.
implementation_effect: Retain overt V過 recognition as an experiential surface family.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a past-tense suffix or an unspoken time expression.

parser_claim: V過 conveys that an event has occurred at least once or belongs to the subject’s experience.
source_proposition: The grammar contrasts experiential 過 with perfective 咗 and gives action and motion examples.
implementation_effect: Represent experience/event occurrence without forcing current-result meaning.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat 過 as interchangeable with 咗.

parser_claim: V過 may be analyzed as a repeatable event type or backgrounded experience, but that theoretical stativity need not become parser ontology.
source_proposition: Fan argues that V過 describes a non-specific-time, repeatable experience/event type and supplies background information.
implementation_effect: Use the source to constrain interpretation while keeping deeper event semantics review-bearing.
forbidden_inference: Do not label all experiential predicates as lexical statives or hide the event.

parser_claim: Aspect-marker selection is lexically and event-structurally constrained.
source_proposition: The illustrative co-occurrence table shows that experiential aspect is not freely compatible with every inner-aspect configuration.
implementation_effect: Require compatibility evidence rather than action_verb + 過 productivity.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the table as exhaustive or universal.

parser_claim: The runtime action_verb + 過 template is a lexical-category heuristic, not a sourced productive construction boundary.
source_proposition: Sources support V過 broadly but do not validate the parser’s action_verb inventory as the grammar rule.
implementation_effect: Separate overt aspect recognition from lexical compatibility and argument structure.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the template to supported_productive.

parser_claim: The overt event and marker must remain visible, with no fabricated count, occasion, or time.
source_proposition: The reference example expresses experience through overt 過.
implementation_effect: Explain experiential meaning while preserving only expressed material.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert once, before, ever, or a past date as hidden tokens.

parser_claim: Motion verbs can take experiential 過 with an overt destination.
exact_locator: Unit 18, PDF pp. 106-107; heui-gwo airport/Space Museum examples
source_proposition: The grammar gives 去過 + destination and contrasts it with 去咗 + destination.
implementation_effect: Retain a narrow overt motion+過+goal profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a destination when none is overt or independently resolved.

parser_claim: Experiential motion differs from perfective/current-result motion.
source_proposition: 去咗機場 implies gone/current relevance, whereas 去過機場 describes prior experience and no longer being there.
implementation_effect: Keep aspectual interpretation separate from the motion-goal relation.
forbidden_inference: Do not conflate MotionGoalVP perfective and experiential subtypes.

parser_claim: The runtime generic movement_verb + 過 + goal template exceeds the exact sourced lexical profiles.
source_proposition: Exact 去過/返過-type evidence does not prove every movement_verb can form the same experiential-goal construction.
implementation_effect: Narrow to attested or independently licensed motion predicates and goals.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize from 去過 to arbitrary movement verbs.

parser_claim: The experiential marker does not encode path, source, direction, or current location.
source_proposition: 過 scopes over the motion event; spatial relations come from overt motion/goal material.
implementation_effect: Preserve only visible spatial structure and keep current-location implications out of the parse.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that the subject is still at, returning from, or traveling toward the goal.

parser_claim: Final 未 can form a yes/no question after V過 and its object or complement.
source_proposition: Examples include 去過太空館未 and 去過曼谷未.
implementation_effect: Require overt experiential material before final 未 for this subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not license generic bare VP + 未 as experiential.

parser_claim: The overt sequence V過…未 is independently attested in a reference-grammar example.
source_proposition: The example combines experiential 過 with final 未 and a question particle.
implementation_effect: Preserve the question marker and optional final particle as overt material.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert 有冇 or reinterpret 未 as simple negation.

parser_claim: The runtime fallback can label an ExperientialVP plus surface 未 as either a question or statement, which is too broad.
source_proposition: Question status must be licensed by final 未 construction and punctuation/particle/context, not merely token co-occurrence.
implementation_effect: Narrow the wrapper to an interrogative profile and keep negative experiential statements separate.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every 過…未 span as a question.

parser_claim: Final 未 asks whether the experiential event has occurred; it does not supply a hidden answer or completion state.
source_proposition: The grammar gives positive V過 and negative 未 responses to such questions.
implementation_effect: Represent interrogative polarity without resolving it.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer yes/no, current relevance, or a specific occasion.

parser_claim: Cantonese attests adjacent 有冇 + V過 questions.
exact_locator: Unit 18, PDF p. 106; 有冇食過香港西餐
source_proposition: The grammar gives 有冇 followed by a V過 experiential predicate and its object.
implementation_effect: Retain a narrow overt 有冇+V過 polar-question profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not rewrite it as exact-copy 有唔有 or hide the experiential marker.

parser_claim: 有冇 + VP is a suppletive Cantonese polar-question strategy, not ordinary token-copy A-not-A.
source_proposition: Hara contrasts Cantonese polar-question types and includes 有冇+VP.
implementation_effect: Keep the suppletive question marker distinct from ordinary V唔V analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not generate 有唔有 or merge all polar questions into one copy rule.

parser_claim: 有 + V過 has broader discourse distribution than some other 有+aspect combinations, but remains semantically constrained.
source_proposition: Fan reports that 有V過 is comparatively acceptable and may occur in wh contexts under conditions.
implementation_effect: Treat 有冇+V過 as an overt composition with discourse/lexical restrictions.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted 有/冇 insertion before every experiential VP.

parser_claim: The runtime optional topic_or_object after an already complete ExperientialVP can duplicate the experiential predicate’s object.
source_proposition: Reference examples place the experiential object inside V過, while the template allows an additional loosely typed nominal.
implementation_effect: Separate true topic/domain material from the experiential predicate’s argument frame.
forbidden_inference: Do not create two object relations for one overt NP or fabricate a missing topic.

parser_claim: The question asks whether an experience/event has occurred and leaves polarity unresolved.
source_proposition: The reference grammar presents overt experiential questioning without supplying an answer.
implementation_effect: Keep question force, aspect, predicate, and objects separate in learner output.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer frequency, time, answer, or current result.
